summary: Good-quality recording of a well‑played show featuring standout renditions of Lay Me Down and China Cat Sunflower, with a strong finish and Brokedown Palace encore.
review: The reviewer praises the performance as “firing on all cylinders,” highlighting tight playing and favorite selections such as Lay Me Down, China Cat Sunflower (noted at the four‑minute mark), and an uplifting close with Going Down The Road/Satisfaction followed by a classic Brokedown Palace encore. No recording flaws are mentioned, implying the sound is clear enough for repeated listening.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review; strong musical praise with no technical complaints suggests a good show and acceptable recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on soundboard or audience source; reviewer did not note any audio issues, implying the recording is listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as well‑played throughout, with a lively mid‑song moment on China Cat Sunflower and an energetic close leading into a satisfying encore.
